261.reason: [Incorrect token type: single '&' should not be assigned TokenType.AND; it's an invalid token and should not produce a valid AND token]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '&' should not be assigned TokenType.AND; it's an invalid token and should not produce a valid AND token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '&' should not be assigned TokenType.AND; it's an invalid token and should not produce a valid AND token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '&' should not be assigned TokenType.AND; it's an invalid token and should not produce a valid AND token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '&' should not be assigned TokenType.AND; this causes incorrect output even when an error is detected]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '&' should not be assigned TokenType.AND; this causes misclassification and violates the requirement that only "&&" is AND. The token should either be treated as invalid or not returned as a valid AND token.]

273.reason: [Incorrect token type: single '|' should not be assigned TokenType.OR; it's an invalid token and should not produce a valid OR token]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '|' should not be assigned TokenType.OR; it's an invalid token and should not produce a valid OR token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '|' should not be assigned TokenType.OR; it's an invalid token and should not produce a valid OR token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '|' should not be assigned TokenType.OR; it's an invalid token and should not produce a valid OR token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '|' should not be assigned TokenType.OR; this causes incorrect output even when an error is detected]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: single '|' should not be assigned TokenType.OR; similar to '&', this misclassifies an illegal symbol as a valid OR token, contradicting the spec which states that standalone '|' or '&' are lexical errors.]
